cards.title: Colour Therapy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Red (620–750nm): Stimulating, circulatory
  • Blue (450–495nm): Calming, anti-inflammatory
  • Green (495–570nm): Balancing, healing
  • Yellow (570–590nm): Digestive, mental clarity
  • Indigo/Violet: Neurological, spiritual
  • Contraindications & session protocols
